text.title: product-analytics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-analytics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated SQL referencing columns that don't exist in the schema.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs hallucinate column names that "should" exist. Use sqlglot + schema validation to reject unknown columns before execution.

failure-mode.description: DAU definition drift between queries — any-event, core-action, and session-started all produce different numbers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents pick whichever definition fits the narrative. Pin one DAU definition in the prompt and add it to the schema as a named metric.

failure-mode.description: Declaring "Reports drives retention" from N=12 without p-value or sample-size threshold.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent-generated insights from small samples mirror common SaaS narratives. Force n_users in every output row and wire minimum-sample gates into summarizer prompts.

failure-mode.description: Sending raw event rows containing email addresses or account IDs to the LLM provider.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Raw PII in LLM calls may violate GDPR DPA. Aggregate first or hash identifiers before analysis.

failure-mode.description: Declaring funnel drop causal without an experiment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Step-3 dropoff is correlation; the fix might help for a different reason. Force "this is correlation; run experiment to confirm" in all insight outputs.
